name: Diaochan

skills.name: Explosion of Fragrance
skills.description: Applies stacks to the opponent. At max stacks, deals area damage and slows enemies, while recovering Health.

skills.name: Returning Lotus
skills.description: Sends out a lotus in the target direction that returns to her when it reaches its max distance, damaging enemies in its path.

skills.name: Petals in the Wind
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, becoming untargetable during the dash. Releases petals to attack nearby enemies, dealing damage and reducing the cooldown of Skill 2.

skills.name: Flowery Potential
skills.description: Conjures up a magic circle around her, which lasts for a period of time. While she is within the circle, the cooldowns of Skill 1 and Skill 2 are sped up. The circle deals damage to enemies within it when it is conjured and when it expires.

skillsZh.name: 語・花印
skillsZh.description: 為對手疊層，滿層後造成範圍傷害和減速，並回復自身生命值。

skillsZh.name: 落・紅雨
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向發射花球，達到最遠距離後返回貂蟬所在位置，對沿途敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 緣・心結
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向突進，期間無法鎖定為目標，發射花球攻擊附近敵人，造成傷害並減少2技能冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 綻・風華
skillsZh.description: 在原地生成法陣一段時間，貂蟬位於法陣範圍內可加快1技能和2技能冷卻。法陣生成和結束時，對範圍內敵人造成傷害。

tips: Build: Twilight Stream, Insatiable Tome, Boots of Resistance.
tipsZh: 貂蟬（中路）：梯度 A，勝率 48.6%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：日暮之流、噬神之書、抵抗之靴.

patchHistory.detail: "Diaochan is one of only a few mages who have to get up close and personal with her enemies. This leaves her more vulnerable to attacks, so we've enhanced her base stats in order to help her shine."

patchHistory.change: Made cooldown reduction for Skill 2 smoother.
patchHistory.detail: "Diaochan's Skill 2 provides a significant cooldown reduction when hitting enemies, but it can be very frustrating when a miss disrupts follow-up combos.  In order to alleviate this, we've made the cooldown reduction mechanism more continuous."

Reduced Health per level.
Diaochan is getting a lot of opportunities to farm, so she's reaching peak power very quickly.With the right equipment, she's very hard to counter.As such, we're reducing her base Health to give her a smaller margin of error.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「作為法師，貂蟬是為數不多需要在人群中起舞的，因此也面臨著更多危險；我們適當提高她的基礎屬性，讓她有更多展示精華表現的可能性。」
貂蟬的2技能命中敵人時，會有很高的冷卻返還收益，但失手時也會帶給玩家很強的挫敗感，影響後續的技能銜接。我們嘗試將2技能冷卻返還機制由離散變得更連續，提升貂蟬玩家的使用體驗。

patchHistoryZh.change: 適當降低貂蟬隨等級成長的生命值
patchHistoryZh.detail:
适当降低貂蝉随等级成长的生命值。
貂蝉在当前版本的节奏中可以获得更好的发育空间，从而更快地来到她的强势期。当貂蝉获得了一定的装备支持后，她将变得难以被反制。我们适度降低了她的基础生命，希望借此可以降低她的容错性

faqs.question: Is Diaochan good in current season?
faqs.answer: Diaochan is Tier A Mage with 48.6% win rate, 0.76% pick rate, and 0.09% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Diaochan build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Twilight Stream, Insatiable Tome, Boots of Resistance, Augur's Word, Frozen Breath, Savant's Wrath.

faqs.question: How to counter Diaochan?
faqs.answer: Pick Liang, Mulan. Strong into Luna, Zhang Fei.

faqsZh.question: 貂蟬 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 貂蟬 為 A 梯度，勝率 48.6%、選取 0.76%、禁用 0.09%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 貂蟬 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：日暮之流、噬神之書、抵抗之靴、時之預言、凝冰之息、博學者之怒.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 貂蟬？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Liang、Mulan。貂蟬 克制 Luna、Zhang Fei。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Luna, Zhang Fei. Weak into: Liang, Mulan.

guide.overview: Diaochan is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 48.2% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Diaochan: Applies stacks to the opponent.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Insatiable Tome, Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, then complete Augur's Word, Breakthrough Robe, Savant's Wrath. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Saint for stats that match Diaochan's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Returning Lotus → Petals in the Wind → Flowery Potential → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Flowery Potential (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Returning Lotus, and Flowery Potential on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Returning Lotus → Petals in the Wind → Flowery Potential → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Diaochan is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 48.2% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Diaochan. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Diaochan vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 2.8% more often globally. Choose Diaochan when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Diaochan vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 3.6% more often globally. Choose Diaochan when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Diaochan excels into Luna, Zhang Fei. Avoid blind picking into Liang, Mulan without team peel.
